description_long: This obelisk features a tall, narrow, black vertical shaft with a stepped and slightly ornate top, mounted on a rectangular brick-clad pedestal. The shaft appears to be made of metal or painted stone, with a matte, dark finish and subtle geometric detailing. The pedestal is constructed from red bricks with visible mortar lines, giving it a robust and urban appearance. On one face of the pedestal, there is a dark plaque, likely metal, which may contain an inscription or dedication. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, suitable for placement in public urban spaces such as parks or sidewalks. The structure is solid and immovable, intended as a commemorative or decorative urban feature.
description: A tall, black, metal or stone obelisk with a stepped top, mounted on a rectangular red brick pedestal featuring a plaque on one side. The design is sturdy and urban, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from the side, showing the plain brick pedestal and the vertical shaft with its stepped top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the pedestal, displaying a dark plaque centered on the brick face beneath the obelisk.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the obelisk, similar to view 0, shows the plain brickwork without any plaque or additional features.
description_view_3: The rear view of the obelisk, showing the stepped top and the brick pedestal, with no visible plaque or inscription.
attribute_inscription: A single dark plaque is visible on the front face of the brick pedestal, likely containing an inscription. The text is not legible in the images, but the plaque is rectangular and metallic.
attribute_ornamentation: Minimal ornamentation; the only decorative elements are the stepped and slightly ornate top of the obelisk shaft.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular pedestal clad in red bricks with visible mortar lines, featuring a single dark plaque on the front. The top of the base is flat and supports the obelisk shaft.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is stepped and slightly ornate, with a geometric, tiered design and a matte black finish.
